Mary saw Leslie working at the office from 12pm to 2pm. So noon to 2 PM, Leslie was working. 4. Steven saw Leslie getting coffee at the cafe from 2pm to 7pm. So from 2 PM until 7 PM, Leslie was at the cafe with Steven. 5. The movies closed after 7pm, so the latest possible time Leslie could go is before 7. Now, the question is asking between what times could Leslie have gone to the movies. The options are A, B, C, D. Let me break down each possible time window. That would be the possible window when they could have gone to the movies. Looking at the options: A) 7am to 12pm – this matches the unaccounted time B) 2pm to 7pm – Leslie was at the cafe C) 12pm to 2pm – Leslie was at the office D) 6am to 7am – Leslie was on the rooftop with Susan So the correct answer should be A) 7am to 12pm.
